item.title: Quick Pit Stop on the Farm
item.description: A brief pause during a busy day on the farm. Watch farm life in action as a farmgirl takes a quick break before getting back to work.

media:content.media:title: Quick Pit Stop on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A brief pause during a busy day on the farm. Watch farm life in action as a farmgirl takes a quick break before getting back to work.

item.title: A New Method That Could Replace Pipe Laying
item.description: Testing a new technique that could make traditional pipe laying unnecessary. Watch the experiment and see if this innovative method works as promised.

media:content.media:title: A New Method That Could Replace Pipe Laying
media:content.media:description: Testing a new technique that could make traditional pipe laying unnecessary. Watch the experiment and see if this innovative method works as promised.

item.title: Testing the Fendt 939 with Horsch Joker
item.description: Watch the Fendt 939 tractor paired with the Horsch Joker in action. See performance, handling, and efficiency on the field during this farming demonstration.

media:content.media:title: Testing the Fendt 939 with Horsch Joker
media:content.media:description: Watch the Fendt 939 tractor paired with the Horsch Joker in action. See performance, handling, and efficiency on the field during this farming demonstration.

item.title: My Mom Is My Biggest Flex
item.description: A heartfelt tribute to a mom who inspires pride and admiration. Watch a personal story celebrating her impact, support, and the bond shared.

media:content.media:title: My Mom Is My Biggest Flex
media:content.media:description: A heartfelt tribute to a mom who inspires pride and admiration. Watch a personal story celebrating her impact, support, and the bond shared.

item.title: A Goody from Harvest Time
item.description: Enjoy a special treat made during harvest season. Watch the process of turning fresh farm produce into a delicious, seasonal goody.

media:content.media:title: A Goody from Harvest Time
media:content.media:description: Enjoy a special treat made during harvest season. Watch the process of turning fresh farm produce into a delicious, seasonal goody.

item.title: Checking for Mouse Nests in Machinery
item.description: Watch the process of inspecting machinery for mouse nests. See how small critters can cause big problems and the steps taken to prevent damage and maintain equipment.

media:content.media:title: Checking for Mouse Nests in Machinery
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of inspecting machinery for mouse nests. See how small critters can cause big problems and the steps taken to prevent damage and maintain equipment.

item.title: Why Farmers Purposely Drive Over Crops
item.description: Learn why farmers sometimes intentionally drive over crops. See the techniques, benefits, and reasoning behind this practice in modern farming operations.

media:content.media:title: Why Farmers Purposely Drive Over Crops
media:content.media:description: Learn why farmers sometimes intentionally drive over crops. See the techniques, benefits, and reasoning behind this practice in modern farming operations.

item.title: He Did a Very Good Job
item.description: Watch a job done with impressive skill and attention to detail. See the process and results that make this work stand out as exceptionally well done.

media:content.media:title: He Did a Very Good Job
media:content.media:description: Watch a job done with impressive skill and attention to detail. See the process and results that make this work stand out as exceptionally well done.

item.title: Teaching Him How to Run a Combine
item.description: Watch the process of teaching someone to operate a combine harvester. Learn the basics, techniques, and tips for safe and efficient harvesting.

media:content.media:title: Teaching Him How to Run a Combine
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of teaching someone to operate a combine harvester. Learn the basics, techniques, and tips for safe and efficient harvesting.

item.title: Will Our Old John Deere Start Again?
item.description: Watch the attempt to get an old John Deere running. See the challenges, troubleshooting, and effort involved in bringing this classic tractor back to life.

media:content.media:title: Will Our Old John Deere Start Again?
media:content.media:description: Watch the attempt to get an old John Deere running. See the challenges, troubleshooting, and effort involved in bringing this classic tractor back to life.

item.title: Cold Starting Diesel Engines After Winter
item.description: Learn how to cold start diesel engines after long winter storage. Watch tips, techniques, and precautions to get your engine running smoothly in cold conditions.

media:content.media:title: Cold Starting Diesel Engines After Winter
media:content.media:description: Learn how to cold start diesel engines after long winter storage. Watch tips, techniques, and precautions to get your engine running smoothly in cold conditions.

item.title: The Combine Doesn’t Like It
item.description: Watch a combine struggle with tough conditions in the field. See the challenges, reactions, and how the machine handles difficult crops or terrain.

media:content.media:title: The Combine Doesn’t Like It
media:content.media:description: Watch a combine struggle with tough conditions in the field. See the challenges, reactions, and how the machine handles difficult crops or terrain.

item.title: Case 8250 Tractor and Honda 3-Wheelers
item.description: Watch the Case 8250 tractor in action alongside Honda 3-wheelers. A fun look at farm equipment performance and versatility on the field.

media:content.media:title: Case 8250 Tractor and Honda 3-Wheelers
media:content.media:description: Watch the Case 8250 tractor in action alongside Honda 3-wheelers. A fun look at farm equipment performance and versatility on the field.
